comment: Known collision anomalies tolerated for now. The conformance test fails on NEW ids; remove entries here as they get fixed (baseline should only shrink). | 2026-07-08: +6 stampedBuildings ids from the sign-stamp reorder (signs after buildings changes art pixels over building rects; collision byte-identical, detector artifact). | door:3104,5424 verified pre-existing on main (no warp on walk-up both trees); belongs on the door-fix list, not a batch regression. | 2026-07-18: roofPockets emptied after game-wide roof seal (e9423be9); any new roof pocket now fails collisionConformance.
